title: All Pure Womens 3 Blade Swivel Razor Pack 2 Pieces Lubricating Strip for Comfort
description:
Are you sick and tired of razor bumps and nicks? You need the All Pure Womens 2 Piece Razor Blade Pack! This set of razor blades comes with 6 pieces, so you won't need to worry about running out of razors any time soon. Each razor features 3 swivel blades that will aid grooming in hard to reach places as well as a lubricating strip to ensure a comfortable experience. The razors feature ergonomic handles that will help keep your hand steady during shaving, and they come in a fun pink color that will match your other toiletries. This set of 2 razors is a great option for busy lifestyles!
